scripts.electron:build: bun build electron-main/main.ts electron-main/backend.ts --outdir dist-electron --target node --format cjs -e electron && node -e "require('fs').writeFileSync('dist-electron/package.json', JSON.stringify({type:'commonjs'})); require('fs').copyFileSync('electron-main/preload.cjs', 'dist-electron/preload.cjs')"
scripts.electron:dev: bun run electron:build && VITE_DEV_URL=http://localhost:5180 electron dist-electron/main.js
scripts.prestart: pkill -f 'mcp-team-hub.*electron' 2>/dev/null; lsof -ti :58590 | xargs kill -9 2>/dev/null; lsof -ti :5180 | xargs kill -9 2>/dev/null; true
scripts.start: concurrently -k -n VITE,ELECTRON -c blue,green "bun run dev" "wait-on http://localhost:5180 && bun run electron:dev"
